title: Crustle Red Team BLACK v1
intent: Real-ladder-derived Crustle (Dwebble/Crustle, cards 344/345) stall deck. Crustle's ability 'Mysterious Rock Inn' blocks all damage from opponent's ex Pokemon attacks, making it a structural counter to ex-based attackers like Team Rocket's Mewtwo ex. Sourced from prior championship exploration (crustle_championship/finalists/CRUSTLE_FINALIST.deck.csv), reused here as a Red Team adversary to screen candidates against, not to promote itself.
policy_note: Uses a generic, archetype-agnostic heuristic policy (attack > evolve > ability > energy > play > retreat > end by option kind only) -- no dedicated championship-level tuning, since this deck's role is to be a credible opponent, not a submission candidate.
